seo.title: SBEnterprises | IT & Facility Solutions Provider
seo.description: SBEnterprises (Siri Bhavani Enterprises) is your trusted IT & Facility Solutions partner, serving Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, and surrounding South India regions with manufacturer-certified hardware and cybersecurity.
seo.keywords: IT solutions, facility management, cybersecurity, hardware providers, networking, CCTV surveillance, firewall, enterprise IT, Hyderabad, South India, Siri Bhavani Enterprises

hero.title: Your Trusted Partner in IT & Facility Solutions.
hero.desc: Comprehensive infrastructure management — from enterprise-grade servers to full-scale facility security systems, delivered with manufacturer-certified reliability.

list.title: Desktops & Laptops
list.desc: Consumer electronics and corporate fleets with dedicated service agreements.

list.title: Server & Storage
list.desc: High-performance frameworks for complex data management.

list.title: Printers & Plotters
list.desc: Wide-format professional units built for corporate production spaces.

list.title: CCTV Surveillance
list.desc: Multi-site monitoring solutions with enterprise-grade installation.

list.title: Firewall & Cybersecurity
list.desc: Brand-certified hardware protecting against advanced cyber threats.

stats.title: Making technology accessible and reliable across South India.
stats.description: Founded as a modest tech sales startup, SBEnterprises has evolved into a comprehensive IT solutions provider through strategic manufacturer partnerships and deep client trust.

clientsCard.title: Major Clients
clientsCard.note: Additional accounts managed via Shivani Didi
